chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No. 2168 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of bail application. 23-11-2023 Mr. Liaquat Ai Khan Advocate along with applicant Imran Elahi present on bail Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Awan, Additional Prosecutor General for the State ============= Omar Sial, J: Applicant Imran Elahi son of Ikram Elahi, has sought pre- arrest bail in crime number 944 of 2023 registered under section 420, 34 P.P.C. at the Zaman Town police station. Earlier, his application seeking bail was dismissed on 25.09.2023 by the learned 4thAdditional Sessions Judge, Karachi-East. 2. I have heard the learned counsel for the applicant and the learned Additional Prosecutor General for the State. 3. Admittedly, the applicant has been charged under section 420 PPC which is a bailable offence, therefore, the interim pre-arrest bail earlier granted to the applicant is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. JUDGE Amjad PS
